violations.description: Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -Clean hot hold trays and warmer. -Clean ice cream machine. -Clean inside all coolers.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean ice catcher shield in big ice machine.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean all shelving in kitchen.

Backflow prevention. — --Plumbing system was not installed to preclude backflow of a solid, liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply system. -Drain line for soda dispensers need to be shortened so they are above the plain of the floor drain.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Kitchen needs more thoroughly cleaned.
General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. -Back door has gap on bottom corner.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean ice cream dispenser tray.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean food warmers. -Clean all shelving in kitchen.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors and ceiling need more thorough cleaning.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)

Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
